## LibraryData.specToLoadParams() function

Converts a LibraryLoadSpec to ILoadCollectionFromFileTreeParams.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare function specToLoadParams<TCollectionId extends string>(spec: LibraryLoadSpec<TCollectionId>, mutable?: MutabilitySpec): ILoadCollectionFromFileTreeParams<TCollectionId> | undefined;
```
